view.title: Domain {hostname}
view.name: Name:
view.allGoodNoErrors: All good! No errors in contact information!
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Are you sure you want to resend the welcome email?
view.welcomeEmailResent: The welcome email has been resent. Check your inbox.

order.findDomain: Find your domain and check availability.
order.premiumAvailable: Yes! Your domain {domain} is available and it is a premium domain. Automatic registration is disabled. Email {email} if you would like to purchase this domain for {cost} per year.
order.premiumTaken: Sorry! Your domain {domain} is already taken! You already own it? You can transfer it, and it is a premium domain. Automatic registration is disabled. Email {email} if you would like to purchase this domain for {cost} per year.
order.available: Yes! Your domain {domain} is available! You can register it for {cost}. Renewal cost will be {renewal}.
order.taken: Sorry! Your domain {domain} is already taken! You already own it? You can transfer it for {cost}. Renewal cost will be {renewal}.
order.subscriptionAutoRenew: The subscription will automatically renew after every year at {cost} until canceled.
order.subscriptionDisclaimer: By checking this box, you acknowledge that you are purchasing a subscription product that automatically renews (As Per The Terms Outlined Above) and is billed to the credit card you provide today. If you wish to cancel your auto-renewal, you may access the customer portal (Here) select the active service and click the Cancel link or email at: billing{'@'}interserver.net or use another method outlined in the Terms and Conditions. By checking the box and clicking Place My Order below, You also acknowledge you have read, understand, and agree to our Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy.
order.agreeCheckbox: I have read the terms above and I agree.
order.searchingDomain: Please wait! Searching for this domain name.

nameservers.title: Domain Name Servers
nameservers.suggestedApplied: Suggested nameservers have been applied. Click Update to save.
nameservers.deleteConfirm: You are about to delete your domain nameserver.

eppCode.title: Email EPP Code
eppCode.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to send EPP Code to the registered email?

whois.title: Whois Privacy
whois.renewalNote: Whois Privacy gets renewed every 12 months from the date of activation. Whois Privacy addon renewal cost is {cost}.
whois.notAvailable: Whois Privacy is not available for this TLD.
whois.currentlyEnabled: Whois Privacy is currently enabled for {hostname}.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription1: Contact Privacy hides the identity of a Registrant when a user does a WHOIS lookup on that Registrant's domain.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription2: The benefit of having Contact Privacy is that the Registrant's identity, including home address, phone number, and email address, is shielded from spammers, identity thieves and scammers.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription3: When Registrants enable the Contact Privacy service, masked contact information appears in the public WHOIS database.
whois.contactPrivacyAvailable: Contact privacy is available for {cost} per domain per year.
whois.enableNow: To enable Contact Privacy for your Domain, Place Order Now.
whois.confirmOrderMessage: Whois Privacy cost: {cost} per year. Are you sure you want to place this order?
whois.enableMessage: Your domain {hostname} has a paid whois privacy addon that is not yet enabled. Would you like to enable it now?
whois.disableMessage: Your domain {hostname} Whois Privacy addon is currently enabled. Are you sure you want to disable and cancel it?
whois.whoisDisabled: Whois Privacy has been disabled and canceled.

whoisToggle.title: Whois Privacy Addon
whoisToggle.addonEnabled: Your domain {domain} Whois Privacy addon is Enabled
whoisToggle.addonDisabled: Your domain {domain} Whois Privacy addon is Disabled
whoisToggle.confirmEnable: Are you sure you want to Enable Whois?
whoisToggle.confirmDisable: Are you sure you want to Disable and Cancel it?

lock.title: Domain Lock/Unlock
lock.activateLock: Do you want to Activate domain lock?
lock.inactivateLock: Do you want to Inactivate domain lock?

dnssec.title: DNSSEC Information
dnssec.enterDigest: Enter Value of Digest (Must not be greater than {max} Characters)
dnssec.unableToParse: Unable to parse DS record format.
dnssec.confirmRemoveAll: This will remove all DNSSEC records for this domain.
dnssec.noRecordsWarning: Please fill in at least one DNSSEC record.

renew.title: Renew
renew.tip1: Domain should be renewed on or before expiry date.
renew.tip2: If domain expired it may have a grace period from expiry date to renew.
renew.tip3: Enable Whois Privacy to hide your Contact Information when a user does a WHOIS lookup on that Registrant's domain.
renew.alreadyRenewed: You have already renewed your domain!
renew.payExistingInvoice: To renew your domain, kindly pay the existing invoice.
renew.confirmRenewalMessage: Total cost: {cost}. Are you sure you want to place this renewal order?

transfer.title: Transfer Status
transfer.notATransfer: This domain is not a transfer.
